headline: HSBC Slows $4 Billion Private Credit Expansion After Expected $400 Million Hit
summary: HSBC remains committed to private credit while reassessing risk appetite after exposure tied to Apollo's Atlas SP Partners.

headline: Here’s Silver Beech Capital’s Investment Thesis for Apollo Global Management (APO)
summary: Silver Beech Capital, a value-oriented investment management firm, released its first-quarter 2026 investor letter. A copy of the letter is available to download here. Since its inception, Silver Beech has achieved a net annualized return of 16.4%, representing an annualized outperformance of 4.0% over the S&P 500. The fund returned -2.0% through the first quarter […]
